item.title: AI Agents in Nondestructive Testing: From Concept to Implementation
item.description: Discover how to build practical no-code AI agents to streamline workflows, improve decision-making, and increase efficiency for NDT professionals, quality managers, and inspection engineers.

item.title: Sensofar webinars - Our knowledge and expertise available for you
item.description: Upcoming and recording webinars from all of the presented sessions. You will find interesting information here. Watch them!

item.title: Altus and Koh Young to Host Webinar Showcasing AI Applications in Inspection Software - What's New in Electronics
item.description: Altus Group, a distributor of capital equipment for the electronics manufacturing industry in the UK and Ireland, and Koh Young Technology, a global provider of True 3D measurement-based inspection systems, will host a technical webinar on 28 April 2026 showcasing how artificial intelligence (AI) is being applied within inspection software to improve process control and […]

item.title: Webinar: Preventing Critical Misses in Defect Detection
item.description: Join technical experts from Voxel51 and MongoDB to explore a data-centric approach to defect detection.

item.title: Automated Defect Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Digital Radiography
item.description: This webinar examines how AI and automated defect recognition (ADR) are transforming digital radiography, shifting the bottleneck from image acquisition to evaluation, and covering applications, standards, and regulatory considerations in NDT.

item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision
item.description: Is your quality control still manual? It’s time for a reality check. 🚗💡 The ASQ Automotive Division of the American Society for Quality is proud to present an exciting series of high-impact webinars featuring Global Quality and Industry Experts from across the manufacturing landscape. Traditional inspection is slow, prone to error, and costly. But the future of manufacturing isn't just about automation—it’s about intelligence. Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how hashtag # AI and hashtag # Machine hashtag # Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy.

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability | ASNT Education
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs. Designed for technicians, Level III supervisors, and managers.
